scripts.abeyjs:new: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js init
scripts.abeyjs:new:landing: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js init --template landing
scripts.abeyjs:new:appbar: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js init --template admin --shell appbar
scripts.abeyjs:add:openapi: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js add openapi
scripts.abeyjs:connect: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js connect
scripts.abeyjs:generate:views: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js generate views
scripts.abeyjs:generate:ecosystem: npm run build -w @abeyjs/cli && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js generate ecosystem
